channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Bezi Mega Jam Hosted by BeziHQ Â· #bezijam 0 Joined Overview Community Submissions open from 2026-09-14 07:00:00 to 2026-09-29 06:59:59 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam Welcome This is not a regular jam. Most game jams award cash prizes and call it a day
